productDisplayName: Arrow Sport Men Black Slim Fit Shirt
description: Style Note The addition of refined details in this formal staple elevates this cotton shirt above the ordinary. Incorporating this season's hottest trends from the runway into your wardrobe, this shirt tops our officewear wish list! Style it with pale chinos and understated, tonal accessories. Product Details Black shirt, made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Material and Care 100% cotton Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using mild detergent Do not wring, scrub or bleach Tumble dry low Medium steam iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Slim fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18') is wearing a size 42
